version_description: A simplified version that is easy to play on guitar.
tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: I Just Called To Say I Love You

recommended.version_description: Hello, This was made to be as accurate as possible. These are the closest to the studio version, and if you want to have less barre chords , put a capo on 2nd fret and transpose down 2 steps.

content:
[Intro]
|N.C.  [ch]Am[/ch]    |           |[ch]G[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]     |           |
|[ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]Dm[/ch]    |      [ch]Em[/ch]   |     [ch]Am[/ch]    |     [ch]Dm[/ch]    |
|[ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]    |           |[ch]G[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]     |           |
|[ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]Dm[/ch]    |      [ch]Em[/ch]   |     [ch]Am[/ch]    |     [ch]Dm[/ch]    |


[Verse 1]
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]
Call up, ring once, hang up the phone[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]
To let me know you made it home[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]
Don't want nothing to be wrong with part-time lover[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
If she's with me I'll blink the lights[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]
To let you know tonight's the night[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]
For me and you, my part-time lover[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]
We are undercover passion on the run[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dm[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]
Chasing love up against the sun[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]
We are strangers by day, lovers by night[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Dm[/ch]                    [ch]Esus4[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
Knowing it's so wrong, but feeling so right[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]
If I'm with friends and we should meet[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]
Just pass me by, don't even speak[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Dm[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]
Know the word's "discreet" with part-time lovers[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
But if there's some emergency[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]
Have a male friend to ask for me[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]Dm[/ch]                      [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]
So then she won't peek its really you, my part-time lover[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]
We are undercover passion on the run[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dm[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]
Chasing love up against the sun[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]
We are strangers by day, lovers by night[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Dm[/ch]                    [ch]Esus4[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
Knowing it's so wrong, but feeling so right[/tab]

[Interlude]
|[ch]E[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]    |          |[ch]G[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]    |          |
|[ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch]    |      [ch]Em[/ch]  |     [ch]Am[/ch]   |     [ch]Dm[/ch]   |
|[ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]    |          |[ch]G[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]    |          |
|[ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch]    |      [ch]Em[/ch]  |     [ch]Am[/ch]   |          |

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]
We are undercover passion on the run[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dm[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]
Chasing love up against the sun[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]
We are strangers by day, lovers by night[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Dm[/ch]                    [ch]Esus4[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
Knowing it's so wrong, but feeling so right[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]
I've got something that I must tell[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]
Last night someone rang our doorbell[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]
And it was not you, my part-time lover[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
And then a man called our exchange[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]
But didn't want to leave his name[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]Dm[/ch]
I guess that two can play the game[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]
Of part-time lovers[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]
You and me, part-time lovers[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]
But, she and he, part-time lovers[/tab]

[Outro]
|N.C. [ch]Am[/ch]   |[ch]Am[/ch]        |[ch]G[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]    |          |

|[ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch]   |     [ch]Em[/ch]   |     [ch]Am[/ch]   |     [ch]Dm[/ch]   |
